title: 1. Shoe Yu\ Ma3 Jin1 Shui3, Liu4 Kuai4, and Qi1 Kuai4 (LCH):
text:
•
Shui3 Yu4: This point is located on the proximal aspect of the brachium 2.0 cun
immediately posterior, and sliyhtly inferior, to Bei1 Mian4. Needle 0.3 to 0.5 cun. {Kidney
Branch Reaction Area} (Bei Mian 4 is located in the center of the depression found
immediately lateral to the acromion process when the arm is abducted to 90°)
•
Ma3 Jin1 Shui3: This point is found on the face in the depression located along the inferior
border of the zygomatic bone at the medial-to-lateral level of the lateral canthus. Needle 0.1
to 0.3 cun. {Kidney and Lung Auxiliary Reaction Areas}
•
Liu4 Kuai4: This point lies 1.4 cun lateral to the center of the philtrum (i.e. 1.4 cun lateral
to Ren2 Zhong1 or Du-24). Needle 0.1 to 0.3 cun. {Secretion/Excretion Reaction Area}
•
Qi1 Kuai4: This point is located 0.5 cun lateral to the commissure of the lips at the angle of
the mouth. Needle obliquely from medial to lateral 0.5 to 1.5 cun. {Lung Reaction Area}
155
Nephrolithiasis (LKC-1)
